scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web,gateway -c cyan,magenta,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "npm --prefix gateway run dev"
scripts.build:all: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix web run build && npm --prefix gateway run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck && npm --prefix gateway run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix web run lint && npm --prefix gateway run lint
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:all
scripts.deploy:home: npm run build:home && npx wrangler pages deploy web/dist --project-name ai-omdala-home
